articles.headline: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
articles.description: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
images.caption: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 win as Rice, Gordon, Watkins score
articles.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.

images.name: Declan Rice [1296x729]
images.caption: Declan Rice opened the scoring for England shortly after 10 minutes played.

images.name: Tuchel: England can't be World Cup favourites
images.caption: Thomas Tuchel says England can't be favourites because there are "proven winners" at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
articles.description: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

images.name: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
images.caption: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

articles.headline: Argentina wins as Messi scores in cameo in front of 88k in Alabama
articles.description: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

images.name: Messi celeb Arg Iceland_260609 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.

article.headline: Netherlands rout Canada in Jesse Marsch's 1st game as coach
article.description: Jeremie Frimpong scored one goal and laid on another as the Netherlands netted three times in 13 second-half minutes to spoil Jesse Marsch's first match in charge of Canada with a 4-0 victory in a friendly in Rotterdam on Thursday.
article.linkText: Netherlands rout Canada in Marsch's 1st game

images.name: Netherlands celeb vs. Canada_20240606 [1296x729]
images.alt: Memphis Depay of the Netherlands (L) celebrates scoring the opening goal with team mate Jeremie Frimpong during the international friendly match between Netherlands and Canada at De Kuip on June 06, 2024 in Rotterdam, Netherlands.

article.story:
Jeremie Frimpong scored one goal and laid on another as the Netherlands netted three times in 13 second-half minutes to spoil Jesse Marsch's first match in charge of Canada with a 4-0 victory in a friendly in Rotterdam on Thursday.

Memphis Depay scored his 45th international goal when he poked home Frimpong's inviting cross from the right, before the Bayer Leverkusen winger netted when he curled the ball into the net from 10 yards with his left foot.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, NWSL more (U.S.)

Wout Weghorst added a third when he profited from an error by Canada goalkeeper Dayne St. Clair, who spilt a routine save into the path of the tall forward, before Virgil van Dijk headed in a late fourth.

The Dutch, preparing for the European Championship in Germany, play Iceland in a home friendly on Monday, while 2026 World Cup co-hosts Canada will play in this year's Copa America and travel to France for another warm-up game on Sunday.

Information from Reuters contributed to this report.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Moïse Bombito (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Netherlands 0, Canada 0.
Second Half begins Netherlands 0, Canada 0.
Substitution, Canada. Jacob Shaffelburg replaces Liam Millar.
Goal!  Netherlands 1, Canada 0. Memphis Depay (Netherlands) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Jeremie Frimpong with a cross.
Substitution, Canada. Dominick Zator replaces Alistair Johnston because of an injury.
Substitution, Canada. Charles-Andreas Brym replaces Tajon Buchanan.
Goal!  Netherlands 2, Canada 0. Jeremie Frimpong (Netherlands) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the right to the top left corner.
Substitution, Netherlands. Steven Bergwijn replaces Jeremie Frimpong.
Substitution, Netherlands. Wout Weghorst replaces Brian Brobbey.
Substitution, Netherlands. Donyell Malen replaces Memphis Depay.
Goal!  Netherlands 3, Canada 0. Wout Weghorst (Netherlands) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Canada. Junior Hoilett replaces Cyle Larin.
Substitution, Canada. Mathieu Choinière replaces Stephen Eustaquio.
Substitution, Netherlands. Stefan de Vrij replaces Matthijs de Ligt.
Substitution, Netherlands. Virgil van Dijk replaces Daley Blind.
Substitution, Canada. Samuel Piette replaces Ismaël Koné.
Goal!  Netherlands 4, Canada 0. Virgil van Dijk (Netherlands) header from very close range to the bottom left corner    following a corner.
Substitution, Netherlands. Joey Veerman replaces Ryan Gravenberch.
Second Half ends, Netherlands 4, Canada 0.
